seasons.name: Veilfrost
seasons.description: Bitter cold grips the land as frost creeps across crumbling stones. The dungeon exhales freezing mist, and fewer adventurers dare the Faded Halls during these harsh months.

seasons.name: Mistmergence
seasons.description: Warm rains and thick mists shroud the ruins as life returns to the surface. The dungeon grows more active, its corridors shifting with renewed vigor.

seasons.name: Deepgloom
seasons.description: Oppressive heat and unnatural darkness plague the land as the dungeon's influence waxes strong. Strange lights flicker in the depths and more monsters roam.

seasons.name: Ruinwither
seasons.description: Dry winds scour the dusty plains as leaves turn brown and the dungeon grows quieter. Old bones surface in the Faded Halls as if the earth itself exhales the dead.

holidays.name: The Founding
holidays.description: Commemorates the establishment of Dusthollow as an official town. The Adventurer's Guild holds a recruitment fair and veterans share tales of their first descents.

holidays.name: Valdros's Fall
holidays.description: Marking the cataclysm that sank the citadel, people light candles in windows to ward off the evil that stirs. The dungeon's entrances shimmer with ethereal light.

holidays.name: Lanterns of the Lost
holidays.description: Adventurers hang paper lanterns bearing names of fallen companions. The glow can be seen for miles, and the dungeon grows strangely quiet for one night.

holidays.name: The Gilded Market
holidays.description: Merchant houses host a grand bazaar where dungeon treasures are auctioned. Coins flow freely and information brokers do their best business of the year.

holidays.name: Descent's Eve
holidays.description: The traditional start of the adventuring season when the most daring expeditions launch. Parties feast and make pacts to share treasures or bring home bones.

holidays.name: The Stillness
holidays.description: A day when no one enters the dungeon, honoring superstitious beliefs that the labyrinth claims all who descend. Ghost stories are told in every tavern.

holidays.name: Shadowstide
holidays.description: Magical phenomena peak as reality grows thin. Scholars study the dungeon from a safe distance while cultists conduct rituals in hidden cellars.

holidays.name: Guardian's Vigil
holidays.description: Adventurer's Guild members stand ceremonial watch at the dungeon entrance. Fresh recruits swear oaths and receive their first copper badges.

holidays.name: The Ash Parade
holidays.description: Survivors march through Dusthollow bearing effigies of monsters they've slain, which are burned at sunset. Ash falls like snow over the celebration.

holidays.name: Soulsdeep
holidays.description: The year's darkest night when families honor ancestors and adventurers lost. Some claim the dead walk the upper dungeon, seeking unfinished business.
